name: sliver-migrate
description: Tier-1 external-attacker validation. Sliver (Bishop Fox) migrates its implant into TestTarget.exe. Framework provides target + telemetry; the operator drives the migrate from the Sliver console while Run-PPLExperiment waits at an interactive prompt.

extra.notes: External attacker: Sliver Go implant, migrate <targetPid>. Reflective PE injection with Go runtime carried inside the payload.
